Commands for Pebble watch operations, PULSE transport configuration, and software version definition.

## Folders
- **[commands](commands/README.md)**: Commands for taking screenshots, installing language packs, and testing on a Pebble watch.

## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Defines a PULSE transport configuration for Pebble devices and sets up logging and command handling.
- **[version.py](version.py.md)**: Defines the version of the software as "1.0.1".
